expression.expression: CAST((SUBSTRING( CAST((REGEXP_REPLACE((REGEXP_REPLACE((FORMAT_NUMBER(CAST(`Subject ID` AS DOUBLE), 0)), ',', '__THS__')), '__THS__', '')) AS string), 1, 4)) AS string)
CAST(`Type of Request InquiryChange Request` AS string)
CAST(`Collection Date in eData Optional` AS string)
CAST(`Response or Resolution Details` AS string)
CAST(`Priority High Medium Low` AS string)

(CASE WHEN ((TRY_TO_TIMESTAMP(CAST(reportrundate AS string), 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss.SSSS')) IS NOT NULL) THEN CAST((TRY_TO_TIMESTAMP(CAST(reportrundate AS string), 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss.SSSS')) AS DATE) WHEN ((TRY_TO_TIMESTAMP(CAST(reportrundate AS string), 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss')) IS NOT NULL) THEN CAST((TRY_TO_TIMESTAMP(CAST(reportrundate AS string), 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss')) AS DATE) ELSE CAST((TRY_TO_TIMESTAMP(CAST(reportrundate AS string), 'yyyy-MM-dd')) AS DATE) END)
CAST(`Collection Date in CRF If Available` AS string)
CAST(`Response Needed By Date` AS string)
CAST(`Additional Identifier eg Lab ID Test Name` AS string)

CAST(CASE WHEN (contains(coalesce(lower(Collection_Date_in_CRF_If_Available), ''), lower('N/A')) OR contains(coalesce(lower(Collection_Date_in_CRF_If_Available), ''), lower('NA'))) THEN NULL ELSE Collection_Date_in_CRF_If_Available END AS STRING)
CAST(`Type of Request InquiryChange Request` AS string)
CAST(`Collection Date in eData Optional` AS string)
CAST(`Response or Resolution Details` AS string)
CAST(`Priority High Medium Low` AS string)

(CASE WHEN ((TRY_TO_TIMESTAMP(CAST(reportrundate AS string), 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss.SSSS')) IS NOT NULL) THEN CAST((TRY_TO_TIMESTAMP(CAST(reportrundate AS string), 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss.SSSS')) AS DATE) WHEN ((TRY_TO_TIMESTAMP(CAST(reportrundate AS string), 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss')) IS NOT NULL) THEN CAST((TRY_TO_TIMESTAMP(CAST(reportrundate AS string), 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss')) AS DATE) ELSE CAST((TRY_TO_TIMESTAMP(CAST(reportrundate AS string), 'yyyy-MM-dd')) AS DATE) END)
CAST(`Response Needed By Date` AS string)
CAST(`Additional Identifier eg Lab ID Test Name` AS string)
